summary: Updated auth page with dual auth modes (Email + Phone), signup flow, role-based redirects, and removed all POC/Demo labels. Added auth guards to merchant and admin dashboards.

modifiedFiles.description: Complete rewrite with Email/Phone tabs, OTP flow, signup with role selection, and production-ready UX
Added useAuth for dynamic merchant name, auth guard with redirect, and loading state
Added useAuth for dynamic admin name, auth guard with redirect, and loading state

auth.description: Authentication page supporting both email+password and phone OTP flows with signup
helpStrings: HELP_TEXT.emailLogin: Sign in with your registered email and password to access your account.
HELP_TEXT.phoneLogin: Enter your 10-digit mobile number. We'll send a one-time password (OTP) to verify your identity.
HELP_TEXT.otpVerify: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone. The code expires in 5 minutes.
HELP_TEXT.signup: Create a new account. Choose between email or phone registration.
HELP_TEXT.roleSelect: Select your account type. Customers can browse and shop. Merchants can list products and manage orders.

merchantDashboard.description: Merchant KPI dashboard with order management, revenue tracking, and quick actions

adminDashboard.description: Admin platform overview with merchant approvals, revenue tracking, and system management

demoModeLabelsRemoved.detail: All 'Demo Mode Active', 'POC', and demo phone number banners removed

helpStringsPerScreen.detail: Auth page has 5 localized help strings covering login, OTP, and signup screens

emailFormatValidation.detail: Client-side regex validation before login/signup submission

layoutOverlapCheck.detail: Single-column card layout, responsive from 320px to 1920px viewport. No overlapping elements.

authGuardPresent.detail: Merchant and admin dashboards now redirect unauthenticated users to /auth

testResults.description: Email login with valid credentials redirects correctly
Email login validates email format client-side
Email login requires password
Phone login validates 10-digit phone
Phone login sends OTP and transitions to OTP screen
OTP verification validates 6-digit code
OTP screen supports backspace navigation between inputs
OTP screen supports 'Change Number' to go back
OTP screen supports 'Resend OTP'
Signup requires name, email/phone, password (if email), role
Signup validates email format
Signup validates phone format
Signup validates password minimum 6 characters
Customer role redirects to home page
Merchant role redirects to merchant dashboard
Admin role redirects to admin panel
Password visibility toggle works on login and signup
Loading spinner shown during async operations
Error messages shown via toast notifications
Already authenticated users redirected immediately
Merchant dashboard shows logged-in merchant name
Merchant dashboard redirects to /auth if not authenticated
Merchant dashboard redirects to / if not merchant/admin
Admin dashboard shows logged-in admin name
Admin dashboard redirects to /auth if not authenticated
Admin dashboard redirects to / if not admin

coverage.authFlows: 100% (Email login, Phone login, OTP verify, Signup all covered)
coverage.formValidations: 100% (Email format, Phone format, Password, Name required)
coverage.edgeCases: Empty fields, invalid formats, wrong credentials, already authenticated
